query:
SET @uid = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE openId='test-screenshot-zap-001');

INSERT INTO services (userId, name, category, description, targetCustomer, mainBenefit, price, isActive)
VALUES (@uid, 'High-Ticket Coaching for Female Entrepreneurs', 'coaching',
  'A 12-week 1-on-1 coaching program that helps female entrepreneurs scale their business to 6 figures using proven systems and mindset shifts.',
  'Female entrepreneurs aged 28-45 who are stuck under $5k/month',
  'Scale to consistent $10k+ months in 90 days without burning out',
  2997.00, true)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name=VALUES(name);

SET @sid = (SELECT id FROM services WHERE userId=@uid LIMIT 1);

INSERT INTO icps (userId, serviceId, name, age, gender, location, income, painPoints, desires, objections, isActive)
VALUES (@uid, @sid, 'Jennifer Profile', '32-42', 'Female', 'United States', '$3k-$8k/month',
  'Stuck in feast-or-famine cycle, no consistent lead flow, overwhelmed by marketing',
  'Consistent $10k months, freedom to work with dream clients, recognized as an expert',
  'Tried other coaches before, not sure if now is the right time, worried about ROI',
  true)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name=VALUES(name);

SELECT s.id as service_id, s.name as service_name, i.id as icp_id, i.name as icp_name
FROM services s JOIN icps i ON i.serviceId=s.id WHERE s.userId=@uid;
